svg.title: Classroom Intelligence Suite — High-Level System Architecture
svg.desc: A structural diagram showing the two modules (Live Monitoring and Lecture RAG), their sub-components, model stack, data flows, and shared Streamlit UI layer.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What video sources does the system support?')
sendPrompt('How does the microphone capture work?')
sendPrompt('What file types can be uploaded to the RAG module?')
sendPrompt('What is the NVIDIA NIM API used for?')
sendPrompt('How does MediaPipe FaceMesh detect faces?')
sendPrompt('Explain the three-layer gaze estimation cascade')
sendPrompt('How does the rolling audio capture work?')
sendPrompt('How does the text emotion classifier work?')
sendPrompt('Explain the cross-modal attention fusion logic')
g.text: gaze · face emotion · speech emotion → Attention% · per-student label

g.onclick: sendPrompt('How does the lecture chunker work?')
sendPrompt('Which embedding model is used for the RAG?')
sendPrompt('How is FAISS used in the RAG pipeline?')
sendPrompt('How does LLaMA-3.1-70B generate grounded answers?')

svg.text: Live video feed · attention chart · speech timeline · RAG chat tab · session CSV log
